title: Inquisition
description: Access villager inventories, decommission iron golems, and expel Nitwits!
body:
# Inquisition
This mod is about villagers

It add two things, The Staff of Inquisition and the Order for Expulsion

## Staff of Inquisition
Using this item within 1ish blocks of a villager will tell you what is in it's inventory, shift-using this item removes all items from the villager inventory and gives them to you. You can always throw back items you don't want!
![Crafting the staff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab0f57911f188c92c0c60c67b6de9005ad91af94.png)

## Order for Expulsion
Using this item on an Iron Golem will "decomission" it, (it will die and drop it's items, but this won't effect your reputation as the golem is actually taking 1000 cactus damage)

Using this item near a Nitwit villager will send it away (it will be teleported out of sight, out of mind)

when using this item, there is a 50/50 chance it will disappear after use!

![Recipe for order of expulsion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c1b75afef351105fbf4bc4f7b3c86ef930fbe60c.png)
